examples: The influence of chlorinated trans 1,4-polyisoprene(CTPI) on the properties of CR/TPI blend was investigated.
Structure and property of epoxidized trans-1,4-polyisoprene(ETPI) by water phase suspension method was studied.
The application of low molecular weight trans 1, 4 polyisoprene wax (LMTPIW) to rubber compound was investigated.
